arts.ttl: Leipzig risk losing several key players if they miss out on Champions League
arts.sum: RB Leipzig will be forced to cash in on key players if they miss out on Champions League qualification.

arts.ttl: Rose given four Bundesliga games to save RB Leipzig job
arts.sum: Marco Rose has been given four Bundesliga games to save his job at RB Leipzig, according to Sport Bild.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig will have to sell several big name players if miss out on Champions League football
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that RB Leipzig could face serious changes this summer if they fail to qualify for the Champions League as the club sank to sixth at the weekend. Regular…

arts.ttl: Decisive weeks ahead for RB Leipzig
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have won just one of their last seven Bundesliga games, which has allowed Freiburg and Mainz to overtake the Saxony club in the race for the final Champions…

arts.ttl: Berlin-born Bence Dardai pledges international future to Hungary, Kicker reports
arts.sum: The 19-year-old midfielder has declared his availability for the Hungarian National Team despite multiple underage appearances for German youth squads.

arts.ttl: German media suggests Hoeness could replace Rose at RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Sebastian Hoeness has been tipped as the man to take over RB Leipzig according to murmurings in the German media.

arts.ttl: Sebastian Hoeneß hotly linked to RB Leipzig as Marco Rose’s future becomes increasingly uncertain
arts.sum: kicker reports that RB Leipzig see VfB Stuttgart’s Sebastian Hoeneß as a candidate to replace Marco Rose as the latter’s future at Red Bull becomes more uncertain. Hoeneß previously worked as…

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve been told’: Arsenal could sign £40m striker this summer as well as Benjamin Sesko – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal absolutely need a new striker this summer. Indeed, Arsenal have had to use Mikel Merino up front as of late, and while Merino earned...
Under-fire RB Leipzig coach Marco Rose has responded to growing criticism of his work.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Wolfsburg preview: Rose under growing pressure
arts.sum: Two teams coming off disappointing draws face each other in the DFB-Pokal on Wednesday when Leipzig host Wolfsburg. Here's our preview of the game, including the predicted lineups.
